problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Plasma. Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
